ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_listings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job listing */,
  "content" TEXT /* Job description */,
  "extra_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the job (e.g., contract details) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the job is posted */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the job listing */,
  "min_salary" TEXT /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" TEXT /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., hourly, annual) */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Required experience level */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the job */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job board where the listing was found */,
  "remote_work" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job allows remote work */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_job_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_board_id") REFERENCES job_boards ("job_board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_boards" (
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job board */,
  "job_board_name" TEXT /* Name of the job board */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the job board */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the job board */,
  "job_board_type" TEXT /* Type of job board (e.g., general, specialized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job listing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job listing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_listings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_board_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job board the credential belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the job board */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the job board */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the job board */,
  "credential_type" TEXT /* Type of credential (e.g., username/password, API key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credential_users" (
  "credential_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential-user association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credential_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credential_users_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES job_board_credentials ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrape_logs" (
  "scrape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scrape event */,
  "job_board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job board being scraped */,
  "scrape_date" TEXT /* Date when the scrape occurred */,
  "num_listings" INTEGER /* Number of job listings scraped */,
  "scrape_status" TEXT /* Status of the scrape (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the scrape fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scrape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrape_logs_job_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_board_id") REFERENCES job_boards ("job_board_id")
)
